title: femboy base
description: maximum optmization and a little beautiful
body:
## FAQ:
What is our Object

Object:
Our goal is to prioritize providing you with the highest level of optimization and seamless compatibility with other mods across Fabric, Forge, and NeoForge platforms, ensuring compatibility with other mods and achieving the highest possible performance.

My information for you to reach me;

Discord server:[discord](https://discord.gg/UmRKhSKqJj)

My name is matrix for contact: @meeiw_you:matrix.org

My matrix server for support: https://matrix.to/#/#littlefile_for_minecraft:matrix.org



## Fabric 

### Core Optimization Mods:
Mods like `BadOptimizations`, `EntityCulling`, `FerriteCore`, `Lithium`, `ModernFix`, `Noisium`, and `Very Many Player`s reduce unnecessary processes to enhance game performance, optimize block and entity processing, and improve overall stability.

### Visual and Interface Enhancements: 
Mods like `Sodium` and `Sodium Extras` significantly increase FPS and fix visual errors by changing the graphics engine. `Reese's Sodium Options` and `Sodium Options API` allow you to control Sodium's settings in more detail.

### And technical information
AVG fps:543

AVG frametime:1.9~

[Technical Pager](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Vi8YEkfrTI2V0sVEd3D8cNlUbtXDOlXu/view?usp=sharing)

## Neoforge and Forge

### Core Optimization Mods: 
Mods such as `BadOptimizations`, `EntityCulling`, `Ferrite Core`, `ModernFix`, `Noisium`, and `Very Many Players` significantly improve performance by reducing unnecessary background processes, optimizing the processing of entities and blocks, and enhancing overall game stability.

### Advanced Graphics and Interface: 
`Embeddium`, `Embeddium Extra`, and `Embeddium++` mods, as a port of Sodium for Forge, renew the graphics engine, providing FPS increases and visual improvements. Sodium Options API, on the other hand, allows for more detailed control of graphics settings.

### And technical information
NeoForge

AVG fps:523

AVG frametime:1.9~

[Technical Pager](https://drive.google.com/file/d/13LZYZJBtbhHxxnMS1rWsDeZcDwb_zfbe/view?usp=sharing)

Forge

AVG fps:534

AVG frametime:1.9~
